news.t: Franklin Custodian Funds' Dynatech Fund: Don't Buy This Dip – Legacy Fund Ratings Are Misleading
This buyback-focused ETF is beating the market—here's how
Deep Dive: This actively managed ETF has a novel approach that can cut risk and lead to higher returns

holdings.infoBox: ABFL is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 4.82%, Apple at 4.68%, Mastercard at 3.00%, AbbVie at 2.89%, and Bristol-Myers Squibb Company at 2.63%.

overview.description: The Abacus FCF Leaders ETF (ABFL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund aims to outperform a broad US equity index. The actively managed fund selects a high conviction portfolio based on strong free cash flow return from invested capital ABFL was launched on Sep 27, 2016 and is issued by Abacus.

data.title: Franklin Custodian Funds' Dynatech Fund: Don't Buy This Dip – Legacy Fund Ratings Are Misleading
data.text: A deep dive into this fund's holdings reveal a portfolio that is inferior to its benchmark and the S&P 500.

data.title: This buyback-focused ETF is beating the market—here's how
data.text: TrimTabs' All-Cap U.S. Free-Cash Flow exchange-traded fund is beating the market this year by focusing on high-quality buyback programs, says its manager.
